name: flying-dress-italy
description: Volare Flying Dress Italy photoshoot booking website

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('public', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('Volare Flying Dress.dc.html', 'public/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('support.js', 'public/support.js'); fs.cpSync('assets', 'public/assets', {recursive:true});"
